message:
chore(beads): file 5 conformance-harness gap beads (cc_1)

Applied /testing-conformance-harnesses to crates/frankenterm-core/.
Filed beads for areas where a conformance harness would catch real
defects, skipping areas where adequate coverage already exists.

ft-5ikbd  robot-mode JSON envelopes have no runtime jsonschema validator
          against docs/json-schema/wa-robot-*.json. The MCP spec's central
          MUST clause ("data MUST match the corresponding robot JSON
          schema") is unenforced; schema_golden.rs only checks that the
          schemas are well-formed, not that production envelopes conform.

ft-2sumi  ft.toml: 53+ documented config keys have no schema/golden
          conformance. README→Config and Config→README drift would land
          green today (serde drops unknown fields silently).

ft-d5268  docs/json-schema/ has no PROVENANCE.md — generator + version
          of every committed schema is unrecorded. Required by the
          skill's "Fixture Provenance (Non-Negotiable)" rule.

ft-b35tw  pattern-pack file format has no spec, no JSON-Schema, no
          fixture corpus. External rule authors must read patterns.rs
          source to learn the schema; format renames break packs in the
          wild silently. Recent symlink-escape fix raises the security
          stakes.

ft-zaqi8  MCP spec MUST/SHOULD coverage matrix is missing. The skill
          mandates a Pass/Total score per spec section before claiming
          conformance; today nobody can answer "which MUSTs are
          unenforced" without re-reading the spec.

Excluded as already adequately covered (per inspection):
  - codec PDU roundtrip (conformance_pdu_wire.rs + 55KB
    proptest_codec_roundtrip.rs + e2e_rolling_upgrade.rs)
  - serde roundtrip generally (530 proptest files in core/tests/)
  - search query language (proptest_query_contract.rs +
    proptest_tantivy_query.rs + frankensearch_integration.rs)
  - recorder event schema (recorder_event_schema.rs +
    proptest_recorder_lexical_schema.rs)
  - TOON↔JSON envelope (proptest_toon_roundtrip.rs +
    wa_mission_toon_mcp_conformance.rs +
    wa_tx_toon_mcp_conformance.rs)
  - distributed wire protocol (5 distributed_*.rs test files)

Audit ran in <30 minutes. Stopped at 5 findings per cap.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
